mapper.select: SELECT cg.group_id AS groupId, cg.name, cg.avatar, cg.owner_id AS ownerId, ou.username AS ownerName, cg.current_members AS currentMembers, cg.max_members AS maxMembers, cgm.role AS myRole, cgm.unread_count AS unreadCount, lm.content AS lastMessage, lm.create_time AS lastMessageTime, cg.create_time AS createTime FROM chat_group_member cgm INNER JOIN chat_group cg ON cgm.group_id = cg.group_id AND cg.is_dissolved = 0 LEFT JOIN user ou ON cg.owner_id = ou.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cgm2.group_id, cgm2.content, cgm2.create_time FROM chat_group_message cgm2 INNER JOIN ( SELECT group_id, MAX(create_time) AS max_time FROM chat_group_message WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY group_id ) latest ON cgm2.group_id = latest.group_id AND cgm2.create_time = latest.max_time WHERE cgm2.is_deleted = 0 ) lm ON cg.group_id = lm.group_id WHERE cgm.user_id = #{userId} AND cgm.leave_time IS NULL ORDER BY COALESCE(lm.create_time, cgm.join_time) DESC
